name: USS LCI(L)-371 (LCI(L)-371)
events: 11 Jan 1945 USS Charr (Cdr. F.D. Boyle, USN) arrived at Saipan. She was escorted in by USS LCI(L)-371 (Lt.(jg) B.M. Daniel, USNR).

12 Jan 1945 Around 0915 K/12, USS Devilfish (T/Cdr. E.C. Stephan, USN) arrived at Saipan from Pearl Harbor. She was escorted in by USS LCI(L)-371 (Lt.(jg) B.M. Daniel, USNR) which she had made rendezvous with around 0200 K/12.
At Saipan, USS Devilfish was taken in hand for voyage repairs by the submarine tender USS Fulton (T/Capt. A.A. Clarkson, USN).

13 Feb 1945 Around 1630 K/13, USS Thresher (T/Cdr. J.R. Middleton, Jr., USN), USS Shad (T/Lt.Cdr. L.V. Julihn, USN), USS Peto (T/Cdr. R.H. Caldwell, Jr., USN) and USS Tilefish (T/Cdr. W.F. Schlech, Jr., USN) departed Saipan for their patrol areas.
They were escorted out until 2320 K/13 by USS LCI(L)-371 (Lt.(jg) B.M. Daniel, USNR).
